firmware.title: X650C-H626DEJ-P-191005V224-191023V236_20191023204347
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X650C-H626DEJ-P-191023V236
Changed Functions:
1.Updated Google GMS package to 201909
2.Updated Yoparty, fixed some issues
3.Updated XClub app
Optimized issue:
1.Optimized camera performance and bokeh effect
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the XCLUB forum (http://bbs.infinixmobility.com) for more information.
